name: 因陀罗之矢
description: 选择同行或同列的一个格子确定方向，朝该方向射出因陀罗之矢，将佐助到地图边缘该方向上所有格子永久标记为天照范围
code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var battle = context.battle; var pos = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 99, filter: 'all' }); if (!pos || pos.needsTargetSelection) return pos; var dx = pos.x - caster.x; var dy = pos.y - caster.y; if (dx !== 0 && dy !== 0) return { success: false, message: '因陀罗之矢只能瞄准同行或同列的格子' }; if (dx === 0 && dy === 0) return { success: false, message: '不能选择自身所在格子' }; var dirX = dx === 0 ? 0 : (dx > 0 ? 1 : -1); var dirY = dy === 0 ? 0 : (dy > 0 ? 1 : -1); if (!battle.extensions) battle.extensions = {}; if (!battle.extensions.tileEffects) battle.extensions.tileEffects = []; if (!battle.extensions.amaterasuCells) battle.extensions.amaterasuCells = []; var cx = caster.x + dirX; var cy = caster.y + dirY; var added = 0; while (true) { var tile = battle.map && battle.map.tiles && battle.map.tiles.find(function(t) { return t.x === cx && t.y === cy; }); if (!tile) break; if (!battle.extensions.tileEffects.some(function(t) { return t.tileType === 'amaterasu' && t.x === cx && t.y === cy; })) { battle.extensions.tileEffects.push({ x: cx, y: cy, sourceId: 'amaterasu', tileType: 'amaterasu', icon: '🔥', bgColor: 'linear-gradient(to top, rgba(140, 15, 0, 0.88), rgba(10, 0, 0, 0.65))', boxShadow: 'inset 0 0 6px rgba(255, 60, 0, 0.5)', iconPosition: 'bottom-right' }); added++; } if (!battle.extensions.amaterasuCells.some(function(c) { return c.x === cx && c.y === cy; })) { battle.extensions.amaterasuCells.push({ x: cx, y: cy }); } cx += dirX; cy += dirY; } if (added === 0) return { success: true, message: caster.name + '射出因陀罗之矢，该方向天照范围已完整覆盖' }; battle.extensions.amaterasuOwnerPlayerId = caster.ownerPlayerId; addPlayerRuleById(caster.ownerPlayerId, 'rule-sasuke-amaterasu-move'); addPlayerRuleById(caster.ownerPlayerId, 'rule-sasuke-amaterasu-endturn'); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '射出因陀罗之矢！新增' + added + '个格子为永久天照范围' }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '选择方向目标格，向反方向延伸永久天照范围至地图边缘', expectedValues: {} }; }
